title: ACC Limited Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ACC Limited Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited Advisory Limited:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
